lore.blubasics.blumasc_plush: Hey that's me. How cute. Place me or put me on your head.
lore.blubasics.rikarashi_plush: Thanks Hans for helping with testing this mod and discussing ideas.
lore.blubasics.blubott_plush: Thanks Anastasia for helping with testing this mod and discussing ideas.
lore.blubasics.xtheherolp_plush: Thanks Nico for discussing ideas and making some weapon models.
lore.blubasics.jump_mushroom: A mushroom that catapults you upwards. But don't worry, its spores dampen the fall.
lore.blubasics.spore_mushroom: This hallucinogenic Mushroom even gives hallucinations while just standing around it.
lore.blubasics.void_block: This mini void swallows light. Releasing it after a short amount of time.
lore.blubasics.beetle_horn: The Horn of a solar beetle. Very rich in calcium.
lore.blubasics.sun_horn: A Solar Beetle horn that is supercharged with solar power.
lore.blubasics.lightning_bottle: Lightning captured in a bottle. Right click to release a lightning arc.
lore.blubasics.mushroom_skewer: This mushroom skewer is light and fluffy. Almost makes you float.
lore.blubasics.cooked_mushroom_skewer: This cooked mushroom skewer is light and fluffy.
lore.blubasics.spine_tree: This sapling makes you one with plants, making you able to go through leaves.
lore.blubasics.void_powder: This powder is used to turn light emitting blocks into Dark Voids.
lore.blubasics.solar_beetle: These Beetles use their wings as solar panels. They collect solar energy to grow their horns.
lore.blubasics.chimera: A combination of Fox, Chicken, Goat, Guardian, Phantom, Rabbit and Hoglin. Can be given items to fight.
effect.blubasics.hallucination.descripti: Makes you see and hear mobs, that are not there.
effect.blubasics.spiked.description: Makes you take damage when moving.
effect.blubasics.void.description: Plunges your eyes into the void. Hinders your vision greatly.
painting.blubasics.flip.title: Detective Flip
painting.blubasics.flip.author: BluMasc
